case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. FILMON TUMEZGHI WELDEYOHAUS ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 67278277) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT FILMON TUMEZGHI WELDEYOHAUS DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-06-2022 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-01-2022 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-13-2022
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 67278277) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-01-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-07-2022 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-06-2022 CONTINUED TO SEP-07-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NOTICE DEFENDANT?S NOTICE OF EXEMPTION FROM FILING AND COURT REPORTER FEES PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 6103(A) AND 6103(B) (TRANSACTION ID # 67278277) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-01-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
